What We Offer

IT Services Built
for Your Business

Everything your office needs to stay connected, secure and running — handled by your local Johor team.

01
☁️

Cloud Computing & Migration

Microsoft 365 setup, Azure migration and cloud management — faster, cheaper and more reliable than on-premise.

02
🖥️

Managed IT & Helpdesk

Proactive monitoring, remote support and a responsive helpdesk — so your team never loses time to IT problems.

03
🔧

On-Site & Remote Troubleshooting

Based in Masai — we can be at your office fast, or resolve issues remotely within minutes.

04
💾

Data Backup & Recovery

Automated daily backups, off-site storage and tested recovery plans — your data is always safe.

05
⚙️

Hardware & Infrastructure

PC and laptop upgrades (SSD), server setup, network cabling and Wi-Fi — we handle the full physical setup.

06
📧

M365 & Email Setup

Professional business email, Teams, SharePoint and OneDrive — configured, migrated and fully supported.
